instruction: User asked if the displayed training data (13.93K tokens, 31 trace artifacts) is real training data before building deeper GUI features.
input: User questioned whether the tokens and traces shown in the GUI screenshot were real training data or placeholder values. Also asked if the autonomous loop log is fixed and complained about lock-based failures being retarded when any agent should be allowed to write the single task.
output: Confirmed YES - that's real training data from actual sessions. The JSONL files contain instruction/input/output/signal tuples from real dialogs. Fixed the write lock to allow ANY agent working on current TASK.md task to write - expired locks auto-release, same task_id can refresh/continue, only denies when DIFFERENT task holds lock. Cleared stale lock file.
